data.body: PLAN-REVIEW ADJUDICATION (13 would-block findings, held-out judge): 5 VALID-BLOCK, 7 BORDERLINE, 1 NIT, 0 FALSE-POSITIVE. Verifier validity is EARNED (no hallucinations) but gate OVER-BLOCKS: only ~5/13 truly block-worthy. Block-worthy ones = CODE-GROUNDED wrong-work-preventing defects (fail-closed blast radius, phantom-config-vs-precedent, unimplementable detector, codebase-unsupported pipeline, undecomposed giant epic). The ~8 borderline/nit = PROCESS/COMPLETENESS archetypes (add-ADR, add-rollback-flag, decompose-cohesive-story, specify-config-format, tidy-AC) that inherit critical severity & clear 0.70 w/o preventing wrong work. Systematic: (1) 'accurate+critical-severity' != 'block-worthy'; (2) G5 decomposition fires same on epics(valid) & cohesive stories(over-eager) w/o altitude adjust. G6=strongest blocker (code-grounded). REFRAME: numeric 0.70 is fine (0 FP, flip-optimal); real lever = per-criterion POSTURE (demote process-heavy criteria, keep code-grounded). Running LARGER per-criterion adjudication to get block-worthy rates.
